title: E-Waste Management Process Flow at Elite Publishing House
description: A flowchart depicting the lifecycle of electronic equipment within a publishing house, from procurement to final responsible disposal or recycling, highlighting key decision points for e-waste management.
relationships: Procurement leads to Usage; Usage leads to End-of-Life decision; End-of-Life decision branches to either Refurbishment/Reuse or Recycling; Recycling leads to Final Disposal only for non-recoverable materials; Refurbishment creates a feedback loop back to Usage
